raw_text: Hi Mirror security team, I think I found something concerning. When I open the 'Share dashboard' dialog and click the recipient dropdown, I can see names of users from OTHER workspaces — not just people in my own workspace. I can actually scroll through what looks like a full list of names I've never seen before. I haven't tried actually sharing with them but the fact that the dropdown is leaking member names across workspace boundaries feels like a cross-tenant leak. Please look into this ASAP.
